message:
fix(codegen): Improve C extension module handling for numpy tests

- Add detection of pure Python subpackages (numpy.testing, etc.) that
  should NOT be loaded as C extensions even though their root module is
- Fix aliased C extension imports (import numpy.exceptions as ex) to
  properly declare the alias variable and import the module

These changes improve numpy test pass rate from 9.1% to 45.5% (5/11 tests).
